~ home posts/ notes/ projects/ about.md uses.md +
guest@berryhill : ~ $whoami --verbose

matt@berryhill 

builder · operator · agent conductor. I run a fleet of specialized AI agents that design, research, code, review, write, analyze markets, and ship software with me. This site is the public terminal into that operating system.

agentsactive

guest@berryhill : ~ $cat manifesto.md

# Manifesto
Beyond the stack lies the shift — a new cultural operating system
where software is grown, not shipped, and the people who steer the
agents matter more than the people who once typed the code.
# EOF · last edit: 2026-06-02

the-agentic-first-development-thesis.md
If the next decade of software is mostly written by agents, the artifact we sit inside has to change. A working sketch of what replaces the IDE.
